title: BioVarFlow parameters
description: A germline variant-calling workflow with standardized QC, annotation, and per-sample reports.

input.title: Samplesheet CSV
input.description: CSV file for variant calling input (required).

outdir.title: Output directory
outdir.description: Where to write results (local path or gs://).

run_id.title: Run identifier
run_id.description: Identifier for this pipeline run. Written into the first column of ${outdir}/manifest/run_output_manifest.tsv. If omitted, Nextflow's auto-generated workflow.runName is used.

_disabled_io_options.title: DISABLED on BioVarFlow_HemOnc branch
_disabled_io_options.description: These parameters are preserved verbatim for future re-enablement (somatic + BAM-input support). This block is intentionally NOT referenced from allOf, so the properties are not validated and do not appear in --help. To restore, move them back into io_options.properties and (if desired) delete this block.

input_bam.title: BAM samplesheet (start from mapped data)
input_bam.description: CSV samplesheet with already-mapped BAM files. When provided, the pipeline skips alignment and starts from markduplicates. Required columns: patient, sex, status, sample, bam, bai. Mutually exclusive with --input.

somatic_mode.title: Somatic mode
somatic_mode.description: Enable somatic variant calling using Mutect2 instead of DeepVariant/HaplotypeCaller. Supports tumor-only and tumor+normal pairs. VEP annotation is skipped in somatic mode.
